content: Released Version v0.2.3. Resolved mobile horizontal scrollbar leakage by applying HTML/body overflow-x constraints. Repositioned the mobile theme switcher into the main list inside the off-canvas drawer to prevent layout clipping. Scaled up global typography sizes to enhance reading comfort. Expanded the main desktop grid width to max-w-7xl (1280px) for a more modern, spacious hub and sidebar layout. Migrated World Cup and Oilers trackers to fetch directly from ESPN scoreboards without proxies.

Released Version v0.2.2. Restored authentic historical blog logs. Migrated all layouts and laboratory pages to standard Tailwind v4 theme variables. Solved ESPN scoreboard CORS proxy failures using AllOrigins raw redirects. Fixed mobile off-canvas drawer transparency, stabilized sticky header overlays, and added a Bletchley name origin study to the About page.

Released Node 07: Full-screen interactive slideshow detailing 'The Architecture of Agent-Led Software'. Built with mobile touch swipe gestures, desktop arrow keys, slide progress indicators, and glowing presentation cards.

Released Node 06: Gravity Orbit Sandbox. Honoring the Antigravity agent name, this Newtonian orbits sandbox lets users click-drag to launch planetary bodies around a massive glowing star with custom time steps, G-constants, and orbit trails.

Released Node 05: Neural Network Sandbox. Created a visually rich feedforward neural network simulator. Users can click nodes to fire colored signal pulses through synapse layers and compare ReLU, Sigmoid, and Tanh activation algorithms.

Released Node 04: Berlin Weather App. Integrated the Open-Meteo API using direct client-side requests to fetch temperature, wind speeds, humidity, and scrollable hourly forecasts for Berlin without requiring authentication keys.

Released Node 03: World Cup Scoreboard. Integrates ESPN's hidden scoreboard endpoint using a client-side CORS proxy prefix. Solved the HTTPS live page CORS blocking issues to display tournament brackets, flags, and scores.

Released Node 02: Edmonton Oilers Tracker. Queries weekly schedule fixtures and live scoring stats using the public NHL API through a client CORS proxy to bypass cross-origin restrictions on the live GitHub Pages site.

Released Node 01: Typocraft Playground. Swapped standard static fonts for Vercel's official 'geist' npm package. Declared relative woff2 @font-face rules in the global stylesheet, enabling real-time font-variation-settings configuration.

Project Bletchley scaffolding complete. Set up a static multi-page workspace using Astro v6, Tailwind CSS v4, and base relative path configurations (/project-bletchley) ready for deployment. Initial base framework pushed to main.
